title: Trying to setup an automation if the Delivery Date is past and the status is not Done change the Status to Urgent and notify someone
excerpt: I do not see an not equal to so thinking now that I might have to write an automation for each status that is not DONE if Delivery Date has past.

posts.author: lmwalker227 (Lisa Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: I do not see an not equal to so thinking now that I might have to write an automation for each status that is not DONE if Delivery Date has past.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@lmwalker227,

Generally speaking, when creating automations that are looking for a specific status condition, the “is” portion can be changed to “is not”. For example, both of the following automations work this way:


… becomes…

image744×166 9.54 KB

Simply click on the “is”.

posts.author: lmwalker227 (Lisa Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: This is so helpful! Thank you, Thank you!

posts.author: lmwalker227 (Lisa Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: This automation was working perfectly early yesterday but then when I select “something” the ANYTHING Status option is no longer available. What could I have done? Better yet, how do I fix it?
